default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly coordination between GrowthX and Understory to discuss upcoming events, campaign performance, and list building strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance for recent campaigns is good, with positive replies every 170 leads (better than industry average)](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Agreed to increase email volume and reduce campaign steps from 3 to 2 to cast a wider net](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Detailed plans for upcoming events: October 10th webinar, Surge Seattle, and GrowthX happy hour](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [New list building strategies discussed for targeted events, including scoring system for existing contacts](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### Campaign Performance and Optimization

  - [Current performance: 1 positive reply per 170 leads (better than industry average of 1 per 400)](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Decision to increase email volume to generate more replies](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Agreed to reduce campaign steps from 3 to 2, as most replies come from steps 1 and 2](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Plan to remove step 3 from current campaigns and add more leads](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### October 10th Webinar Follow-up

  - [Two-hit follow-up strategy: immediate post-event email and community invitation early next week](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Team to prepare copy by tomorrow for Friday send-out](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Additional Luma Blast planned for today to boost attendance](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### Upcoming Events List Building

1.  Surge Seattle (Early November):
    
      - [Target: AI researchers, builders from hyperscaler companies, hot startups in Seattle area](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [30-40 mile radius from downtown Seattle](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Specific data structure required for Airtable CRM import](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
      - [Deadline: 1.5-2 weeks for list preparation](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

2.  GrowthX Happy Hour (October 23rd):
    
      - [Target: 50 attendees (65 RSVPs)](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - [10% existing contacts, 90% new prospects](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Focus on Bay Area contacts who've engaged but never attended live events](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [Plan to develop scoring system for prioritizing invitees](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [Deadline: Start sending invites by Tuesday at the latest](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)

3.  Webflow Live Event (November):
    
      - [Target: Marketing leaders (CMOs, VP+) local to San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Collaboration with Webflow on list building](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Similar criteria to happy hour list, but executive-level focus](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

### Workshop Follow-up Campaign

  - [Ready to launch today using HeyReach](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Mark to inform Jason and proceed unless feedback received](https://fathom.video/share/xJLgisKZ7zMKPGm_2S-GVs7tBHjAXuUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
